user_query: I need to add 4 working hours to my start date of December 31, 2022, in the United States. Can you also provide the end date and time after adding the working hours? Thank you.

TaskList.description: Validate the specified start date and time (December 31, 2022) and check if it falls on a business day in the United States.
Determine the current working hours in the United States and check for any holidays affecting the calculation.
Calculate the end date and time by adding 4 working hours to the validated start date, accounting for any breaks (lunch, etc.) if necessary.
